args.code: (async () => { const findScroller = () => { let best = null; document.querySelectorAll('*').forEach(el => { const cs = getComputedStyle(el); const oy = cs.overflowY; if ((oy === 'auto' || oy === 'scroll') && el.scrollHeight > el.clientHeight + 20) { if (!best || el.clientHeight > best.clientHeight) best = el; } }); return best; }; const sc = findScroller(); if (!sc) return JSON.stringify({error:'no scroller found'}); const steps = []; for (let i=0;i<4;i++){ const beforeTop = sc.scrollTop; const beforeSH = sc.scrollHeight; sc.scrollTop = sc.scrollHeight; await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,2500)); steps.push({ i, tag: sc.tagName, beforeTop, afterTop: sc.scrollTop, beforeSH, afterSH: sc.scrollHeight, grew: sc.scrollHeight > beforeSH }); } return JSON.stringify({ scrollerTag: sc.tagName, scrollerCls: (sc.className||'').toString().slice(0,40), steps }); })()
